series_metadata.series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Software Change Order Form
series_metadata.series_description: Internal form used to document new developments and/or requests for changes in UAN software. Includes supporting test documentation, UAN Software User Manual documentation and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while needed, then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system or application data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
